indication: Intended for non-invasive hair restoration support through ultrasound-based trans-epidermal delivery, with clinical use focused on improvement of hair density and hair regrowth.
Intended for treatment of pigmented lesions, including challenging indications such as melasma, and for tattoo removal applications.
Cleared for dermatologic and general surgical procedures.
Intended for hair removal, permanent hair reduction, and treatment of benign pigmented and vascular lesions.
Indicated for treatment of skin photoaging and its consequences, dermal atrophy, soft filling of skin depressions and wrinkles, and restoration of skin hydration.
Intended for three-dimensional imaging, simulation, and assessment of breast asymmetry, including visualization of volume differences and implant parameter adjustments.
Indicated for improved visualization of veins in geriatric patients, patients with different pigmented skin types, patients with difficult venous access, and pediatric or adult venous access.
Indicated for temporary reduction of cellulite and body contouring through temporary circumference reduction.
Intended for hair removal and treatment of benign vascular and pigmented lesions.
Indicated for tattoo removal at 1064 nm and 532 nm for specified Fitzpatrick skin types and tattoo colors, and for treatment of benign pigmented lesions for Fitzpatrick skin types I-IV.
Indicated as a poly-L-lactic acid implant suitable for increasing the volume of depressed areas, particularly to correct skin depressions.
